summary: Clear matrix recording captures an inspired second set with standout Scarlet > Fire, Promised Land, and Stella Blue > Not Fade Away.
review: The tape, sourced from the original front‑of‑house cassettes, delivers a remarkably clear and well‑balanced stereo image with sparse crowd noise and open, uncompressed drums. Musically the first set is solidly routine, but the second set shines – a rare Scarlet > Fire segue, a fiery Promised Land, and an inspired Stella Blue > Not Fade Away sequence make it worth the listen.

ai_rating.rationale: Detailed positive comments on both performance (inspired second set) and technical quality (clear, excellent stereo image) lead to a high combined rating despite only one review.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear sound with a decent stereo image, phase‑correct mid‑side capture, sparse crowd noise, and an open, uncompressed drum mix; PA is high‑end and audiophile‑grade.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is fairly standard; second set feels inspired with unique segues and strong energy, giving the show its highlight moments.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drum sound described as open and uncompressed.
